title: Daily Access Passes
subtitle: Manage temporary passes for employees without ID documents

modal.title: Create Daily Pass
modal.message: Complete the pass data to assign to selected employees:
modal.reasonPlaceholder: Specify the reason for the temporary pass

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by First Name or Last Name

form.reasonRequired: Please enter the reason for the pass

selectEmployeeError.title: Error
selectEmployeeError.description: Please select at least one employee

datesError.title: Error
datesError.description: Please enter valid start and end dates

createSuccess.title: Passes created
createSuccess.description: Daily passes were created. The QR code was emailed to employees with a registered email.
createSuccess.descriptionWithEmailWarning: Passes were created. {count} employee(s) have no email and will not receive it; use the «QR Code» button in the list to view the code.

systemInfo.title: System Information
systemInfo.description: The system will automatically generate daily QR codes for each employee according to their assigned schedule. Codes will be sent by email.

qrModal.title: Access QR code
qrModal.notAvailable: No QR code is available for this pass.
qrModal.scanHint: Show this code at the access reader. It expires in a few minutes for security.
qrModal.emailNote: This code is also sent by email to the employee if they have a registered email address.

regenerateSuccess.title: QR regenerated
regenerateSuccess.description: A new code was generated and emailed to the employee

regenerateError.title: Error
regenerateError.description: Could not regenerate the QR code

downloadSuccess.title: PDF downloaded
downloadSuccess.description: The daily pass was downloaded successfully

downloadError.title: Error
downloadError.description: Could not generate the pass PDF

pdf.title: Daily access pass
pdf.footer: This document certifies the temporary daily pass and its QR code.

bulkPdf.successDescription: A document with {count} passes was downloaded
bulkPdf.successWithErrorsDescription: A document with {count} passes was downloaded. {failed} pass(es) could not be included.
bulkPdf.errorDescription: Could not generate the consolidated PDF
bulkPdf.noQrDescription: Selected passes do not have QR codes available
bulkPdf.backendUnavailableDescription: Could not fetch pass information. Please try again in a few minutes.

actionsModal.title: Pass Details
actionsModal.confirmDeactivate: Are you sure you want to deactivate this pass?
actionsModal.confirmRenew: Are you sure you want to renew this pass?
